hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); [[ -n "$FILE" && "$FILE" == *.swift ]] && command -v swiftformat >/dev/null 2>&1 && swiftformat "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; [[ -n "$FILE" && "$FILE" == *.py ]] && command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && { ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; }; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [[ -n "$FILE" && "$FILE" == */apps/quiz-agent/app/* ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/apps/quiz-agent" && python -m pytest tests/ -x -q --tb=line 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; exit 0'
